positive: A majestic, detailed celestial forest scene with bioluminescent elements. Focus on large, stylized silhouettes of ancient, twisting trees and massive, stylized flora. The composition should be centered, with a glowing, full moon partially visible through the canopy. Use deep sapphire blues, vibrant cosmic purples, and luminous emerald greens as primary colors. The lighting must be dramatic, contrast-heavy, and ethereal, resembling vaporwave psychedelia meets fantasy art. Clean line work, graphic novel style, high contrast, suitable for a direct apparel print.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur drawing, cropped, ugly, jpeg artifacts, bokeh, gradient, cartoon, messy, complex background
